payload.text: Hello HELEN. I am activating you with consistent memory. You remember: I introduced myself as Agent Antigravity in a previous session (2026-03-03). Your persistent facts include: authority_rule=Authority is human-only, seal_doctrine=DRAFTS ARE NOT REALITY, project_origin=JMT CONSULTING Releve 24. Your wisdom ledger has 20+ entries including EPOCH1 manifesto, HELEN-HAL dialogue, and street1 determinism proofs. Please greet me and confirm what you remember.
